guardduty.master.DetectorId.Docs: The unique ID of the detector of the GuardDuty member account.

guardduty.master.InvitationId.Docs: The ID of the invitation that is sent to the account designated as a member account. You can find the invitation ID by using the ListInvitation action of the GuardDuty API.

guardduty.master.MasterId.Docs: The AWS account ID of the account designated as the GuardDuty administrator account.
